_meta.description: Phase 4 v4 testnet deploy artifacts (plan-008 U16/U17 + D-035/D-036). v4 is a fresh breaking republish of v3: NftCollection gained `quilt_blob_id`, NftToken gained `patch_id`, launch_collection/mint_nft_token signatures changed, and the NftTokenMinted event layout changed (none in-place upgradeable). D-036: mint_nft_token now public_transfers a PLAIN OWNED token (no auto-Kiosk); listing-for-sale is a separate opt-in Kiosk PTB; ensure_collection_policy attaches ONLY the royalty rule (kiosk_lock_rule + personal_kiosk_rule removed) so a bought NftToken is freely usable. The only TransferPolicy is for the L2 NftToken — the generic `transfer_policy_id` / `transfer_policy_cap_id` fields hold THAT policy. Field names kept generic for frontend-config stability (networkConfig.ts parity). Per D-009: testnet is the 6/21 submission target; mainnet ceremony deferred to the 8/27 prize window.
_meta.package_version: v4 (Phase 4, D-035/D-036 — L2 quilt patch + owned-token mint + royalty-only policy)
_meta.transfer_policy_rules: royalty_rule ONLY (D-036 removed kiosk_lock_rule + personal_kiosk_rule). Verified at bootstrap: the ensure_collection_policy tx created exactly one RuleKey dynamic field (royalty_rule::Rule under 0xe308bb3e…).
_meta.kiosk_apps_package_id_discovery: Unchanged from v2/v3 (deps pinned identically — apps@7a07937). The deployed TransferPolicy<NftToken> royalty rule TypeName lives under 0xe308bb3e…. Frontend MUST use the address pinned here, NOT the @mysten/kiosk SDK defaults — otherwise confirm_request fails the rule membership check.
